allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: initialize Next.js 16 project with TypeScript and TailwindCSS

- Set up Next.js 16.1.6 with App Router
- Configure TypeScript with strict mode
- Add TailwindCSS 4 for styling
- Configure remote image patterns for external URLs
- Add environment variables template for API keys
- Install core dependencies: @google/generative-ai, @vapi-ai/web, framer-motion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add glassmorphism theme and utility functions

- Implement dark futuristic glassmorphism design system
- Add custom CSS classes for glass effects and glow animations
- Create utility functions for class name management \(cn\)
- Configure VibeVision voice assistant with inline configuration
- Add image context support for voice assistant discussions
- Set up TailwindCSS theme with custom colors and gradients

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: create reusable UI components with glassmorphism design

- Add GlassCard component with customizable variants
- Implement Button component with Framer Motion animations
- Create Navigation header with accessibility features
- Build ImageUpload component with drag-drop support
- Add Loading component with animated spinner
- Implement all components with WCAG 2.1 AA compliance
- Include proper ARIA labels and keyboard navigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
